command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 'echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/disabletg.py && python3 /tmp/disabletg.py && rm -f /tmp/disabletg.py && systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway && echo restarted && sleep 8 && systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway'
